about.title: About Me
about.bio: Born in Bari in 1998, I'm a Back-end Developer at DXC Technology. Passionate about software, programming, artificial intelligence, videogames and PC hardware.

entries.description: Developing back-end services with Java Spring Boot, integration with Oracle and PostgreSQL databases, message queue management with Apache Kafka and RabbitMQ.
Development on DeepFaceLab fork, experimentation with deep learning and computer vision technologies.
